title: Smoke Potato Delight
description: A sweet and flaky crowd-pleaser Greek dish featuring potatoes infused with smoke for a unique flavor profile.

ingredients.name: smoke flavoring
ingredients.amount: 1 packet (such as Maldon sea salt flakes)

ingredients.name: fresh herbs
ingredients.amount: a handful of dill and parsley, chopped

instructions: Peel the potatoes and cut them into bite-sized chunks.
Place the potato pieces in a large mixing bowl.
Drizzle the olive oil over the potatoes and toss well to coat evenly.
Sprinkle the smoke flavoring and chopped fresh herbs over the potatoes, ensuring they're well distributed.
Spread the seasoned potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Serve warm as a snack or side dish.
